name: Barley with Sun-Dried Tomatoes and Scallions
recipeIngredient: 1 medium bunch scallions (white & green portions) -- thinly sliced
10 Oil-packed sun-dried tomatoes halves -- sliced 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a medium saucepan.
2. Add the barley and cook over high heat for 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
3. Add the scallions and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Add the sun-dried tomatoes, salt, and pepper.
5. Stir in the boiling water and return to a boil.
6. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and cook, stirring occasionally until the barley is chewy, 35 to 40 minutes.
7. Serve with the roast veal and the sauteed broccoli rabe.
